name: CHINA PHARMA HOLDINGS, INC.
business: China Pharma Holdings, Inc., through its subsidiary Helpson, develops, manufactures, and markets pharmaceutical products for human use in China, sold on a prescription basis to hospitals and OTC pharmacies via licensed pharmaceutical logistic companies.

exposures.sentence: Helpson manufactures pharmaceutical products in the form of dry powder injectables, liquid injectables, tablets, capsules, and cephalosporin oral solutions.
Helpson launched N95 Medical Protective masks in early 2023.
Helpson launched Noni enzyme, a natural, Xeronine-rich antioxidant food supplement at the end of 2018.
In April 2024, Helpson began serving as a Contract Manufacturing Organization (CMO) for a project, undertaking its R&D and post-market commercial production.

catalysts.sentence: its flagship product, Candesartan, passed the evaluation of consistency in August 2023.
This project successfully completed process verification in January 2025 and is currently undergoing stability testing.

catalysts.event: NMPA registration application for CMO project
catalysts.sentence: Registration with the National Medical Products Administration (NMPA) has made in the third quarter of 2025.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of invention patent for Apst Vector and Method for Its Preparation
catalysts.sentence: In 2025, Helpson, our wholly owned subsidiary, acquired an invention patent of an Apst Vector and Method for Its Preparation from Yan Yang.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of invention patent for Topiroxostat Nanoemulsion and Method for Its Preparation
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, Helpson, our wholly owned subsidiary, acquired an invention patent of a Topiroxostat Nanoemulsion and Method for Its Preparation from Xiaoyun Chen.

tamClaims.claim: China's entire TCM industrial chain size reached RMB 1.05 trillion (~USD 146 billion) in 2024, expected to exceed RMB 1.13 trillion (~USD 157 billion) in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: the scale of China’s entire TCM industrial chain reached RMB 1.05 trillion (approximately USD 146 billion) in 2024, a year-on-year increase of 11.6%, and is expected to exceed RMB 1.13 trillion (approximately USD 157 billion) in 2025.

tamClaims.claim: China's health service industry size expected to reach RMB 16 trillion (~USD 2.5 trillion) by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: the total size of China’s health service industry is expected to reach RMB 16 trillion (approximately $2.5 trillion) by 2030.
